center.name: 舊金山灣
center.summary: 舊金山灣是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括白尾鳶，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They can be found in Central Valley and southern coastal areas, open land around Goleta including the Ellwood Mesa Open Space, marshes in Humboldt County, and also around the San Francisco Bay

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They can be found in Central Valley and southern coastal areas, open land around Goleta including the Ellwood Mesa Open Space, marshes in Humboldt County, and also around the San Francisco Bay
